subject: feat: decompose prototype into data-driven content architecture
decision: roster is knight/ranger/wizard via palette swaps; rogue retained as data.
why: prototype counted only the 2 entities named 'Forest Orc' toward a 4-kill quota — unwinnable.

decision: quest kill-counter matches all forest archetypes.

subject: feat: decompose prototype into data-driven content architecture
decision: added Y/O colors to base palette; castle is a map-placed prop.

subject: feat: scaffold Vite + React + Vitest toolchain with GPU headed browser tests
why: string provider form is the deprecated v3 shape; v4 d.ts documents the factory import.

subject: feat: adopt r3f HD-2D renderer — research validated, pixi dropped
decision: three.js via @react-three/fiber sole world renderer; DOM UI.
why: spike screenshots judged r3f 2.5D higher calibre than the pixi 2D baseline; three ships RenderPixelatedPass + frustum snapping first-party; pixi lighting plugin is v7-dead; one renderer beats hybrid complexity.

subject: feat: yuka enemy AI — steering-driven behaviors per archetype
decision: flee panicDistance set from archetype keepDistance.
why: yuka FleeBehavior defaults to a 10px panic radius and produces zero force beyond it — kiting silently never moved.
